---
title: "GA4 Certification Exam "
author: "Vianey Villegas"
date: 'March 13,2026'
format: html
---

# GA4 Certification Reflection

## Proof of Completion

![](images/ga4-analytics-certificate.png)

*Figure 1: Screenshot showing certification completion/attempt.*

## 2 Exam Reflection

## Summary:

I complete the Google Analytic 4 Certification exam and got a score of 96/100.

### Top 3 Most Challening Topics

-   Data Sampling
-   Raw Data Access
-   Eveny Based Model

### 2 Concpets I Wish I Could Redo

-   **Event configuration and tracking:** Some questions focused on how events should be structured and configured in GA4. I would like another chance to apply my understanding of event parameters and how they influence reporting.\
-   **Audience and segmentation tools:** A few questions involved identifying how audiences and segments can be used to analyze user behavior. I would like to revisit these questions because I realized I need more practice interpreting segmented data.

### CEP Connection

One thing I would change in CEP is to improve on CEP meaurment plan by ensuring that the key user is significant to my project.

## ![](images/ga4-demo-report.png)GA4 Readiness Check

The KPI I decided to look at is engagement rate. This screenshot show us how the users interact with the website. To be specific, I used the pages and screens report.
